schema.name: MajorBuildInvocations_CL
schema.description: Major.build AI agent invocation logs — captures user, application, resource, and full request payload for every agent invocation.

columns.name: invocationTime
columns.description: Original invocation time as returned by the API.

columns.name: resourceName
columns.description: Name of the resource integration that was invoked.

columns.name: applicationName
columns.description: Name of the Major.build application that triggered the invocation.

columns.name: resourceType
columns.description: Type of the resource (e.g., postgresql, api).

columns.name: userName
columns.description: Display name of the user who triggered the invocation.

columns.name: userEmail
columns.description: Email address of the user who triggered the invocation.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Status of the invocation (e.g., success, failure).

columns.name: payload
columns.description: Full request payload as a dynamic JSON object, including sql, path, method, and other fields depending on resourceType.

columns.name: payloadSubtype
columns.description: Subtype field extracted from the payload.

columns.name: payloadTimeoutMs
columns.description: Timeout value in milliseconds extracted from the payload.

columns.name: payloadType
columns.description: Type field extracted from the payload (e.g., database, api).
